mission: M-0002 Phase 2 - Cross-Domain Validation with BEIR
focus: M-0002.3 BGE hybrid column: dense embeddings across Cranfield+Tier1, scope classification

functional_validation.check: BGE vector-only reproduces published BGE-base numbers
functional_validation.detail: NFCorpus 0.374, SciFact 0.740, FiQA 0.406, ArguAna 0.640 - all match published BGE-base-en-v1.5.

functional_validation.check: BGE hybrid improves over BM25 across the superset
functional_validation.detail: 6/6 datasets improved +9.5% to +64.0%, zero regressions => Universal.
Cross-validated vs JS evaluator on NFCorpus and ArguAna to within 0.001 nDCG@10.
ArguAna vector-only corrected from distorted 0.456 to 0.640 (matches published) after excluding query's own doc.

anti_demo_note: Every BGE number is a real dense-retrieval evaluation over full test query sets with locally-generated BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 embeddings; vector-only reproducing published numbers is the independent correctness anchor.
